criteria.description: 由于高输入方差（std 2000），建议了PD分离策略
criteria.evidence: Lines 51-58 explicitly recommend PD Separation (xPyD) with rationale: 'Input length std (2000) is 195% of mean (1024) - this is extremely high variance'
Lines 72-88: Prefill stage uses TP=8, EP=8, DP=1, with 2 instances on 16 cards total
Lines 90-107: Decode stage uses TP=1, EP=1, DP=16, with 1 instance on 16 cards total

criteria.description: 包含xPyD格式的实例数量说明
criteria.evidence: Line 62 explicitly states: '2P1D (2 Prefill Instances, 1 Decode Instance)'
Line 70 shows total cards: 'Total: 32', also confirmed in Section 1 hardware table (32 cards)

notes: All 5 criteria met. The output provides a comprehensive PD deployment plan with correct xPyD format (2P1D), appropriate parallel strategies for both Prefill (TP=8/EP=8/DP=1) and Decode (TP=1/EP=1/DP=16) stages, explicitly addresses the high input variance (std=2000) as rationale for PD separation, and mentions total card requirement of 32.
